name: @dudousxd/nestjs-context-testing
description: Testing helpers for @dudousxd/nestjs-context — run code inside a fake context store.
author: Davi Carvalho <davi@goflip.ai>
//sideEffects: Safe to be false: this package has NO module-level side effects — only type exports and pure function declarations (runWithContext/enterContext), which call into Context only at runtime, never at import. Enables tree-shaking for consumers. The imported @dudousxd/nestjs-context keeps its own sideEffects field, so its Symbol.for/singleton modules are still retained.
